TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chet Aubuchon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas te 1916, byacing te 5 ru 18 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 178 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 62 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßet auő≤u ¶~ ®ńßon s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē taj s~…ēuruw taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a in*iana, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Chet Aubuchon sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. qutux sa p'aras mari' tay suruw tay suruw. kawas te 1916, byacing te 5 ru 18 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Indiana, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 178 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 62 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
